skipLayer2.reason: needs real bottle photo: a high-ABV wine label (>14%) with ABV missing from the artwork. Current placeholder reuses 05-warn-incomplete which has 13.5% printed and a truncated gov-warning.

bottlerName.evidenceQuote: VINTED AND BOTTLED BY Riverfront Vineyards

governmentWarningText.value: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
